description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build & publish PyPI packages that triggers on push of tags matching v[0-9]+.** and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have three jobs: Make SDist, upload to test PyPI, and upload to PyPI. The Make SDist job should run on multiple OS environments, check out the code, set up MSVC on Windows, install dependencies, build a source distribution, and upload it as an artifact. The upload jobs should download the artifact and publish it to test PyPI and PyPI respectively using provided API tokens.
